summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of IXLPro SaaS website update. All new pages, navigation changes, and interactive features are working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Invalid routes show blank page instead of proper 404 error page
Interactive 3D menu is hidden on tablet view (may be intentional design choice)

passed_tests: Services tab successfully removed from navigation
All new navigation links (Features, Purchase, Reviews, Download, Troubleshooting) working correctly
Features page displays 22 feature tags with clickable details
Purchase page Student/Service toggle functionality working
Purchase page duration buttons (5 buttons) working correctly
Purchase button properly configured for Stripe checkout
Reviews page displays 8 reviews with sorting functionality
Reviews sorting (Most Recent/Most Helpful) working correctly
Download page displays download button and setup instructions
Troubleshooting page search functionality working with 5 articles
Interactive 3D menu displays and tilts on hover
Interactive menu toggle switches (9 switches) working
Interactive menu feature links navigate to /features#feature-id
Discord button properly configured with external link
Keyboard navigation and accessibility features working
75 elements properly configured with data-testid attributes
